headline: Pinterest Links Amazon Storefronts And AWS To Support AI Shopping
summary: Pinterest (NYSE:PINS) is rolling out Amazon Storefront linking for creators, allowing direct integration of Amazon influencer profiles into Pinterest. The company is also expanding its multi billion dollar partnership with Amazon Web Services to support AI and visual discovery features. Together, these updates aim to strengthen Pinterest's position as a product discovery and shopping platform for users, creators, and brands. Pinterest sits at the intersection of visual inspiration, product...
